name: ai-resume-analyzer
description: AI Resume Analyzer (ATS Score + Job Match Analyzer) - MERN + Gemini with local fallback

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
